query:
-- Check if program exists
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.code, d.name as department, c.name as college 
FROM programs p
JOIN departments d ON p.department_id = d.id
JOIN colleges c ON d.college_id = c.id
WHERE p.name LIKE '%Electrical%';

-- Count PLOs for Electrical Engineering
SELECT COUNT(*) as plo_count 
FROM plos 
WHERE program_id IN (SELECT id FROM programs WHERE name LIKE '%Electrical%');

-- Count mappings for Electrical Engineering
SELECT COUNT(*) as mapping_count 
FROM plo_competency_mappings 
WHERE plo_id IN (SELECT id FROM plos WHERE program_id IN (SELECT id FROM programs WHERE name LIKE '%Electrical%'));

-- Count justifications for Electrical Engineering
SELECT COUNT(*) as justification_count 
FROM justifications 
WHERE program_id IN (SELECT id FROM programs WHERE name LIKE '%Electrical%');
